content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('decision_table','decision_talbe');

CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS
SELECT d.*, '' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';

UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp j2 WHERE j2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END;

UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'
WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
   OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
   OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999
   OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')
   OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_final;
CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS
SELECT 
    jt.HAUS,
    jt.ANLAGE,
    jt.ME_MA_ID,
    jt.EQUNR,
    jt.HOUSE_NUM1,
    jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp jt
LEFT JOIN eablg ON jt.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM J09B_temp;

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS
SELECT 
    jt.HAUS,
    jt.ANLAGE,
    jt.ME_MA_ID,
    jt.EQUNR,
    jt.HOUSE_NUM1,
    jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp jt
LEFT JOIN eablg ON jt.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

UPDATE J09B_final
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
);

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING';

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09B meter reading entries excluding mandatory reading.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B completed.

- Created and processed temporary data for TOUR `J09B%`
- Applied decision rules and mandatory reading override
- Exported `792` MANDATORY_READING rows to `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
- Sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Exported `19388` non-mandatory rows to `J09B.csv`
- Sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Cleaned up temporary tables

Note: I handled a small schema/tool exception during execution and completed the process successfully.
